allowed_work: Prepare local card, compatible security-class-3 reader, RFID-off, SAK-lite/XNP-card-path, secureFramework and XNP local-interface readiness checks.
Check Windows REINER SCT DriverPackage path, driver files and installed SmartCardReader provider as metadata only.
Check Windows morris browser middleware installation, service state and local named-pipe metadata only.
Optionally probe the morris localhost HTTP API and PC/SC list-readers path without PIN, card-value or certificate capture.
Check Linux cyberJack driver, PC/SC daemon and USB/PCSC reader visibility as metadata only.
Run the local readiness evidence check in scripts/check_readiness.py without PIN, card-value or API-key capture.
Record anonymized reader fingerprints and driver version metadata.
Record morris session ids and authorization values only as hashes in evidence metadata.
Record non-secret XNP local-interface metadata such as active state and local port range.
Route PIN/card issues to the human operator without requesting values.
prohibited_work: Store passwords, PINs, private keys, certificate material, session cookies, or one-time codes in Git.
Store XNP local-interface API keys, login credentials, certificate material, card values or encrypted key blobs in Git.
Bypass human review for regulated filing, register, mailbox, or notarial actions.
Upload client or mandate content to an LLM unless an explicit approved data-processing basis exists.
Scrape protected portals or exceed published usage limits.
day0: Confirm BNotK chip/signature card availability without reading card values.
Confirm security-class-3 reader model, driver source, PC/SC service and local admin path.
On Windows, confirm REINER SCT DriverPackage path, driver files and installed SmartCardReader provider.
On Windows, confirm morris browser middleware installation and local service state where available.
On Linux, confirm cyberJack driver package status, pcscd and USB/PCSC reader visibility.
Confirm RFID function is disabled where present and not explicitly needed.
Confirm BNotK SAK lite or XNP card path, secureFramework and XNP local-interface readiness without storing API keys.
day1: Run scripts/check_readiness.py for card-reader, RFID-off, SAK-lite/XNP-card-path, secureFramework and XNP local-interface readiness before XNP login testing.
day2: Recertify card-reader, driver, firmware, PC/SC service, SAK-lite/XNP-card-path and secureFramework readiness.
required_accounts_or_approvals: RFID function disabled where present and not explicitly needed
BNotK SAK lite or XNP card path
XNP local interface configuration reviewed without storing API keys
